name: Ham and Cheese Croissants
servings: serves 12 | prep. time 5 minutes | cooking time 15 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Roll out the puff pastry into a large rectangle of ¼-inch thick. Cut into 12 triangles.
To each triangle, add 1 slice of cheese and 1 slice of ham.
Roll out each pastry into a croissant shape. Arrange the croissants on the prepared baking sheet.
Brush each croissant with the whisked egg.
Bake for 15 minutes or until puffed up and golden-brown in color.
